Latest Featured Story

Dr. Swarupa's Himalayan Odyssey: Strength in Nature's Heart

From the azure walls of Jodhpur to the high passes of the Himalayas — discover how Dr. Swarupa finds strength, clarity, and healing in nature's grandest landscapes. A journey of resilience, wonder, and self-discovery.

Dr. Swarupa

Oncologist, Tedx Speaker, Traveller, Healer.

An oncologist, adventurer, and speaker who believes that healing extends far beyond the clinic. Her journey bridges professional excellence and personal philosophy.

Inspiring others through authentic experiences, vulnerability, and the relentless pursuit of a life fully lived.

"Medicine taught me to heal others. The world taught me to heal myself." — Dr. Swarupa
